qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech (Computer Science / Information Technology), MCA / M.Sc. (Computer Science), Postgraduate qualification in Computer Applications preferred
qualification.details: Software Developer – Angular: B.E. / B.Tech (Computer Science / Information Technology) or MCA / M.Sc. (Computer Science) with Postgraduate qualification in Computer Applications preferred. Minimum 2+ years of relevant experience in Angular and ASP.NET Core application development.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Software Developer - Angular recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Madras Software Developer - Angular positions is July 12, 2026. Ensure all your details are accurate and submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Software Developer - Angular post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Information Technology or MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science. A postgraduate qualification in Computer Applications is preferred, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Software Developer - Angular role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Software Developer - Angular position announced by IIT Madras in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Software Developer - Angular position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Software Developer - Angular role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 40,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Madras Software Developer - Angular jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve a Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Software Developer - Angular position?
faq.answer: The Software Developer - Angular positions are offered on a contract basis, providing a fixed-term employment opportunity with IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600036.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this IIT Madras Software Developer - Angular recruitment is ICSR/PR/Advt.122/2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum experience required for the Software Developer - Angular role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience in Angular and ASP.NET Core application development to be eligible for this position.
